ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repository_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GitHub repository */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "monthly_commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits in the month */,
  "monthly_contributors" INTEGER /* Number of contributors in the month */,
  "monthly_open_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests at the end of the month */,
  "monthly_closed_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests closed during the month */,
  "monthly_merged_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests merged during the month */,
  "monthly_PR_mergers" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who merged pull requests */,
  "monthly_PR_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on pull requests during the month */,
  "monthly_open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues at the end of the month */,
  "monthly_closed_issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues closed during the month */,
  "monthly_issue_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on issues during the month */,
  "monthly_stargazer" INTEGER /* Number of new stargazers in the month */,
  "monthly_forks" INTEGER /* Number of new forks in the month */,
  "monthly_watchers" INTEGER /* Number of new watchers in the month */,
  "closed_PRs_2mo" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests closed in the past two months */,
  "monthly_PR_reviewers" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who reviewed pull requests */,
  "monthly_PR_review_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on pull request reviews */,
  "monthly_issue_assignees" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who were assigned to issues */,
  "monthly_new_contributors" INTEGER /* Number of new contributors in the month */,
  "monthly_active_contributors" INTEGER /* Number of active contributors in the month */,
  "monthly_code_changes" TEXT /* Total number of lines of code added and removed */,
  "monthly_PR_merge_time" REAL /* Average time taken to merge a pull request (in days) */,
  "monthly_issue_resolution_time" REAL /* Average time taken to resolve an issue (in days) */,
  "monthly_PR_open_time" REAL /* Average time pull requests were open before being closed or merged (in days) */,
  "monthly_issue_open_time" REAL /* Average time issues were open before being closed (in days) */,
  "monthly_PR_reopen_count" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests that were reopened */,
  "monthly_issue_reopen_count" INTEGER /* Number of issues that were reopened */,
  "monthly_PR_abandoned_count" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests that were abandoned (closed without merging) */,
  "monthly_issue_abandoned_count" INTEGER /* Number of issues that were abandoned (closed without resolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_metrics_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the GitHub repository */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the GitHub repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the repository is released */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* The default branch of the repository */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (public, private, internal) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date of the last activity in the repository */,
  "stars_count" INTEGER /* Total number of stargazers */,
  "forks_count" INTEGER /* Total number of forks */,
  "watchers_count" INTEGER /* Total number of watchers */,
  "open_issues_count" INTEGER /* Current number of open issues */,
  "open_PRs_count" INTEGER /* Current number of open pull requests */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the repository is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the user has access to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the user */,
  "github_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's GitHub profile */,
  "github_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's GitHub avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)
